final:
module HMAC (
    input [127:0] key,
    input [127:0] message,
    output reg [127:0] hmac
);
    always @(*) begin
        hmac = key ^ message; // Simple XOR-based HMAC for demonstration
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      hmac = ~key & ~message;
    end
  end

endmodule
